'''rolazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagistic|imagistic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagistic|imagistic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rolazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolazithi|rolazithi]] || [[word:rolaziji|rolaziji]] || [[word:rolazishi|rolazishi]] || [[word:rolaziki|rolaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolazuthuthu|rolazuthuthu]] || [[word:rolazujuju|rolazujuju]] || [[word:rolazushushu|rolazushushu]] || [[word:rolazukuku|rolazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolazuthu|rolazuthu]] || [[word:rolazuju|rolazuju]] || [[word:rolazushu|rolazushu]] || [[word:rolazuku|rolazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolazufthuf|rolazufthuf]] || [[word:rolazufjuf|rolazufjuf]] || [[word:rolazufshuf|rolazufshuf]] || [[word:rolazufkuf|rolazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolazethe|rolazethe]] || [[word:rolazeje|rolazeje]] || [[word:rolazeshe|rolazeshe]] || [[word:rolazeke|rolazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolazothotho|rolazothotho]] || [[word:rolazojojo|rolazojojo]] || [[word:rolazoshosho|rolazoshosho]] || [[word:rolazokoko|rolazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolazotho|rolazotho]] || [[word:rolazojo|rolazojo]] || [[word:rolazosho|rolazosho]] || [[word:rolazoko|rolazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolazofthof|rolazofthof]] || [[word:rolazofjof|rolazofjof]] || [[word:rolazofshof|rolazofshof]] || [[word:rolazofkof|rolazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfthÃŸf|rolazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfjÃŸf|rolazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfshÃŸf|rolazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfkÃŸf|rolazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rolazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rolazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rolazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rolazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfthÃŸf|rolazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfjÃŸf|rolazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfshÃŸf|rolazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfkÃŸf|rolazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfthÃŸf|rolazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfjÃŸf|rolazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfshÃŸf|rolazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolazÃŸfkÃŸf|rolazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolazÃḊthÃḊ|rolazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rolazÃḊjÃḊ|rolazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rolazÃḊshÃḊ|rolazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rolazÃḊkÃḊ|rolazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolazathatha|rolazathatha]] || [[word:rolazajaja|rolazajaja]] || [[word:rolazashasha|rolazashasha]] || [[word:rolazakaka|rolazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolazatha|rolazatha]] || [[word:rolazaja|rolazaja]] || [[word:rolazasha|rolazasha]] || [[word:rolazaka|rolazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolazafthaf|rolazafthaf]] || [[word:rolazafjaf|rolazafjaf]] || [[word:rolazafshaf|rolazafshaf]] || [[word:rolazafkaf|rolazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rolazasha|rolazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rolazshÃḋsha|rolazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rolazrosha|rolazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rolazmusha|rolazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rolazyasha|rolazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorolaznkshÃḋsha|gorolaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorolaznkrosha|gorolaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorolaznkmusha|gorolaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorolaznkyasha|gorolaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rolalazasha|rolalazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rolalazshÃḋsha|rolalazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rolalazrosha|rolalazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rolalazmusha|rolalazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rolalazyasha|rolalazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorolalaznkshÃḋsha|gorolalaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorolalaznkrosha|gorolalaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorolalaznkmusha|gorolalaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorolalaznkyasha|gorolalaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:relÃḊzasha|relÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:relÃḊzshÃḋsha|relÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:relÃḊzrosha|relÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:relÃḊzmusha|relÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:relÃḊzyasha|relÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorelÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gorelÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorelÃḊznkrosha|gorelÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorelÃḊznkmusha|gorelÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorelÃḊznkyasha|gorelÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rolfazasha|rolfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rolfazshÃḋsha|rolfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rolfazrosha|rolfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rolfazmusha|rolfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rolfazyasha|rolfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorolfaznkshÃḋsha|gorolfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorolfaznkrosha|gorolfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorolfaznkmusha|gorolfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorolfaznkyasha|gorolfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
